prompt: Position comparison: the button is first to enter before the flop. Compared with UTG first-in, classify how constrained the button range is.
why_v1: Less constrained means late position can keep a more varied set of hands.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button range is less constrained because late position can include a more varied set of hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The button range is less constrained than UTG because fewer players remain behind.
